title: Scientific American
text: Home * Periodical * Scientific American Cover of the September 1848 issue [1] Scientific American , a popular science magazine, founded by inventor and publisher Rufus Porter in 1845 as a four page weekly newspaper. Since 2009, Mariette DiChristina is the eighth editor-in-chief. Martin Gardner was author of the Mathematical Games column from 1956 to 1981 [2] [3] . Occasionally, Scientific American had notable articles on AI and computer chess topics.
